title: crotalaria glabripedicellata
intro: Crotalaria glabripedicellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the hairy-stemmed rattlebox or rattlebox. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria glabripedicellata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and injuries. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria glabripedicellata can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant material for use in capsules or as a topical cream.
